Structured, inclusive sports programs for children of all abilities — building confidence, teamwork, and joy through movement.

View Programs Get Started
Who We Are

Built for Every Child

JetSpeed Sports, founded in Volusia County, Florida, creates an environment where every child — regardless of ability — can participate, grow, and thrive through sports.

Our programs are designed to build confidence, encourage teamwork, and provide meaningful experiences through movement. As a nonprofit, our mission is to serve special needs families who deserve access to structured, coached, and genuinely inclusive youth sports.

2025
Founded
100%
Inclusive
All
Abilities Welcome
Our Purpose

Our Mission

JetSpeed Sports exists to serve special needs families by providing an opportunity to try out all different sports in a safe, inclusive, understanding, and encouraging environment. Our desire is for every child to experience the joy of being a part of a team, while getting outside for healthy movement.
What We Offer

Programs Built to Empower

Each session is guided by experienced coaches who meet every child where they are — with patience, adaptability, and genuine enthusiasm.

⚽

Multi-Sport Training

Explore soccer, running, throwing, and more across every session.

🎯

Skill Development

Progressive drills that build coordination, confidence, and ability.

🤝

Team Experience

Every child belongs to a team — cheered on by coaches and peers alike.

🎍

Supportive Coaching

Trained volunteers and coaches who celebrate every win, big or small.

Real Impact

Real Growth Happens Through Movement

Every sprint through the cones, every kick of the ball, every high-five is a step forward. We watch kids arrive unsure — and leave with their heads held high.

The field is a place where ability is defined by heart, not diagnosis.

Our Approach

Guidance That Meets Every Child

Our coaches and volunteers bring patience, creativity, and genuine care to every session. We adapt drills, modify activities, and celebrate progress at every level.

  • ✓One-on-one hands-on instruction
  • ✓Sensory-aware, safe environments
  • ✓Positive reinforcement always
  • ✓Volunteer mentors & trained staff
  • ✓Inclusive of all learning styles
Our Community

Connection That Stays

Beyond drills and games, JetSpeed Sports is a community. Parents, coaches, and kids come together each session to encourage, cheer, and grow — together.
